name: Crock-Pot Minestrone Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium red bell pepper, seeded and diced
1 Medium zucchini, sliced into 1/4 inch thick rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients except the rice to the Crock-Pot.
2. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours [High: 4 to 5 hours].
3. Stir in the cooked rice and combine well.
4. Serves 6 to 8.
